description: Live device session 2026-04-29 09:41 (#116). Outdoor walking with phone, locked on a person in dark/blue clothing on a sidewalk. ~57s, 1700 frames at 29.97fps. Live session showed 12 reacqs across 433 engine-processed frames with multiple impostor admissions (sim<0.5 + znMnv3 negative + reId=1.000). Multiple REACQUIRE_raw frames saved upside-down — this replay tests whether the engine processes upside-down bitmaps (production bug) or just saves them that way (cosmetic).
